content: Clerk Android SDK v1.0.31 (com.clerk:clerk-android-api): Clerk.initialize(this, publishableKey). Sign-in: Clerk.auth.signInWithPassword{identifier; password}. Sign-up: Clerk.auth.signUp{}. getToken: Clerk.auth.getToken(). setActive: Clerk.auth.setActive(). Org memberships: Clerk.user?.getOrganizationMemberships(). Invitations: organization.createInvitation(emailAddress, role). minSdk=24, Java 17+. Orgs support added via 2026-06-05 release. Maven Central only. Organizations support now available including OrganizationSwitcher UI component.
